While including a strong foundation in the traditional areas of psychology, the major is interdisciplinary in nature and emphasizes subject matter within cognitive psychology, computer science, mathematics, and related disciplines. </span></p><p><br></p><p>Listed below are the lower division preparation courses for the major. Students are classified as Pre-Cognitive Science until all preparation courses are completed at UCLA. Transfer students must be directly admitted as Pre-Cognitive Science in order to major in Cognitive Science. Note: You must be directly admitted in to this major and cannot change into this major after admission to UCLA.</p><p><br></p><p>To be considered for this major, you should complete the following seven courses by the spring before transfer:</p><ul><li>One year of Calculus,</li><li>One course in Introduction to C++, and</li><li>Four courses from the following:</li><li class=\"ql-indent-1\">Introductory Psychology</li><li class=\"ql-indent-1\">Introductory Biology or Biology for the major</li><li class=\"ql-indent-1\">One course from Introductory Physics, Chemistry or Linguistics</li><li class=\"ql-indent-1\">Philosophy (Critical Reason, Science of the Mind or Logic)</li><li class=\"ql-indent-1\">Additional Intermediate Level Computing courses</li></ul><p>All courses must be taken for a letter grade.</p><p>Applicants for Fall 2024 and beyond must complete seven courses, including one computing course, by end of spring before transfer.</p><p><br></p><p>For more information regarding this major and UCLA's selection process, visit <u style=\"color: rgb(41, 98, 255);\">https://www.psych.ucla.edu</u> and <u style=\"color: rgb(41, 98, 255);\">https://</u><a href=\"http://www.admission.ucla.edu\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">admission.ucla.edu</a>.</p><p><br></p><p>PLEASE NOTE: the community college courses listed below have been approved to satisfy the preparation requirements for this major at UCLA, but they may not be exact equivalents of the UCLA courses listed.</p>","groupId":"efc26f45-6887-ef11-8474-000d3a37e3b6","position":1,"area":"General"}]
